title: Baked Alpha
description: Intends to alter the game to be an amalgamation of old Minecraft, current Minecraft and a pinch of Terraria.
body:
Intends to alter the game to be an amalgamation of old Minecraft, current Minecraft and a pinch of Terraria with the purpose of making the game more enjoyable and removing features which I personally consider disrupting or annoying.

# Old Minecraft
Nostalgic Tweaks, Golden Days & the Programmer Art Continuation Project.
These by themselves already re-add all desireable features of old minecraft while also removing a major annoyance. For more details you probably should just look into the Nostalgic Tweaks mod.

### Highlights:
- removing the hunger bar
- better textures (imo)
- sword-blocking
- no attack cooldown

# Current Minecraft
Not much to say here. Except for things disabled by Nostalgia Tweaks everything else is retained E.g. Ancient Cities and Trial Chambers exist unchanged. 

# Terraria
This currently involves Inventory management related annoyances. In the future I intend to add a Terraria inspired game progression through selected modded bosses and corresponding gear.

### Highlights:
- 9999 max stacksize
- no durability

#
Considering the current lack of a Goal, if you're like me and can't play a pure sandbox for more than half an hour, this might be enjoyable played as though it were a roguelike.
From personal experience I recommend challenging a Trial Chamber with a friend.
